question: How many teachers have taught a student who has not won any achievements?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.teacher_id) FROM Teachers t JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id WHERE c.student_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id FROM Students s JOIN Achievements a ON s.student_id = a.student_id);

back_translation.intent: 统计没有成就记录的学生对应的教师数量
filters: c.student_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id FROM Students s JOIN Achievements a ON s.student_id = a.student_id)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求统计至少教过一个无成就学生的教师数量，SQL反向翻译通过筛选无成就学生（Students与Achievements的JOIN排除有成就的学生）并使用COUNT(DISTINCT teacher_id)实现相同逻辑，且正确关联了Teachers-Classes-Students-Achievements四张表。
